name: SOLMARI Shin-Okubo
description: Authentic Nepalese traditional cuisine and Himalayan spices tucked away in the vibrant heart of Shin-Okubo, Tokyo. Famous for handcrafted momos, traditional Thakali sets, and rich local hospitality.

seo.title: SOLMARI Shin-Okubo | Authentic Nepalese Restaurant & Curry Izakaya in Tokyo
seo.description: Experience true Himalayan flavors at SOLMARI Shin-Okubo. From traditional Dal Bhat sets and juicy Momos to Nepali grilled chicken and local beers, discover Tokyo's premier Nepalese dining destination.
seo.menuTitle: Our Authentic Himalayan Menu | SOLMARI Shin-Okubo
seo.menuDescription: Browse the rich selection of traditional Nepalese dishes at SOLMARI. Explore our custom spice blends, handmade steamed momos, fiery choyla, and hearty set menus.
seo.aboutTitle: Our Story & Himalayan Heritage | SOLMARI Shin-Okubo
seo.aboutDescription: Learn how SOLMARI brought the rich cultural heritage and warm, hospitable flavors of traditional Nepalese home cooking straight to the bustling lanes of Shinjuku, Tokyo.
seo.contactTitle: Find Us & Book a Table | SOLMARI Shin-Okubo
seo.contactDescription: Located just 3 minutes from JR Shin-Okubo Station. Contact us for reservations, private party packages, event hosting, and authentic catering services.
seo.brandTitle: SOLMARI - The Soul of Nepalese Hospitality
seo.brandDescription: Bridging cultures through perfectly balanced traditional spices, homemade culinary craftsmanship, and an open, festive atmosphere.
seo.companyDescription: Official business registry and corporate details for SOLMARI operations in Shinjuku City, Tokyo.

data.title: Our Story: A Festive Slice of Kathmandu in Tokyo
data.content: Founded in the colorful spring of 2015, SOLMARI was created to build a genuine, uncompromised gateway into the deep food culture of Nepal. Hidden on a charming upper floor just steps away from the bustling Shin-Okubo station lanes, our kitchen treats local Tokyo food enthusiasts and international travelers alike to the rich comforting flavors of home-style Himalayan cooking.
additionalContent: We ground all our signature spices in-house daily, striking a deliberate balance that highlights natural warming cardamoms, fenugreek, and mustard oils without overwhelming the clean, fresh notes of our handpicked vegetables and locally sourced meats.

Beyond exceptional food, SOLMARI is designed as an open cultural home. Our spacious dining rooms are outfitted with full live sound arrays, projectors, and community tables designed to host festive gatherings, live folk music events, and celebrations that connect Tokyo directly to the heart of Nepal.

founder.name: Chef D. Thapa
founder.bio: Born and raised in the Kathmandu valley, Chef Thapa trained heavily in classical culinary traditions before moving to Tokyo. He balances deep ancestral spice combinations with subtle creative profiles tailored beautifully to urban international palates.

data.description: SOLMARI自慢のメニューの数々をご覧ください。ネパール伝統のハーブとスパイスで丁寧に仕上げた数々の料理を、心ゆくまでお楽しみいただけます。
data.description2: 世界中から厳選したスパイスと新鮮な素材を活かし、ヒマラヤの伝統的な味わいとモダンな技を融合させた料理を一つひとつ丁寧にお作りしています。

contact.holidayNotes: Operating hours may vary slightly during National Holidays and the New Year festive season.

team.name: Chef D. Thapa
team.bio: Bringing over fifteen years of dedicated traditional spice blending mastery from Nepal straight to our neighborhood.

reviews.author: Maricchi
reviews.comment: Perfect for Nepalese Cuisine Beginners. I visited during lunch hours and had the Solmari Special Set. The rice, bean curry, and select curry were excellent.

reviews.author: Manabi
reviews.comment: Authentic Nepalese Curry for Under JPY 1000. Tucked away down a side alley, just a short walk from Shin-Okubo Station. Incredible, authentic local flavor profiles.

reviews.author: Seichan1013
reviews.comment: Great value at Okubo! Truly immerses you into an aromatic local vibe. Generous portions that leave you completely full and satisfied.

reviews.author: Poppo
reviews.comment: Delicious Momos at this famous Nepalese spot. They are super juicy with a perfect kick of garlic and heat, similar to top-tier soup dumplings.

reviews.author: Komedarian
reviews.comment: The perfect Nepalese restaurant for enthusiasts. We reserved their beautiful semi-private party room space. Incredible stability and friendly service.

menu.name: Classic Steamed Momo
menu.description: Hand-folded Nepalese-style steamed dumplings filled with spiced ground chicken, fresh garlic, and warming ginger root. Served fresh with our signature house tomato-sesame dipping chutney.

menu.name: Traditional Soup Momo
menu.description: Savory Himalayan-style soup dumplings submerged completely inside a deep bowl of aromatic, spiced sesame and tomato broth broth.

menu.name: Solmari Special Thakali Set
menu.description: An authentic Himalayan culinary tradition featuring premium long-grain rice, mixed spiced lentils (dal), mixed seasonal vegetable curry, choice of signature mutton or chicken gravy, fresh ghee, and authentic pickles.

menu.name: Chicken Sekuwa skewers
menu.description: Tender boneless chicken thigh marinated deeply in Himalayan wild herbs and native spices, slowly char-grilled over open coals.

menu.name: Spicy Mutton Choyla
menu.description: Tender, robust wood-fired bone-in mutton tossed and stir-fried vigorously in a bold, spicy traditional Nepalese marinade rich in toasted mustard oil and fenugreek.

menu.name: Himalayan Biryani (Half)
menu.description: Fragrant long-grain basmati rice steamed slowly in layers with tender meat, aromatic mountain herbs, and premium whole spices.

tagline: Authentic Himalayan Spice, Unmatched Community Warmth
